general.name: mos_target_field_parquet
general.description: The table includes the field information, where a field is a unique pointing of the telescope on the sky.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_field.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.name: pk
pk.description: The primary key. A sequential identifier.

racen.name: racen
racen.description: The Right Ascension of the center of the field.

deccen.name: deccen
deccen.description: The Declination of the center of the field.

version_pk.name: version_pk
version_pk.description: The primary key of the version in the dr20_version table.

cadence_pk.name: cadence_pk
cadence_pk.description: The primary key of the cadence in the dr20_cadence table.

observatory_pk.name: observatory_pk
observatory_pk.description: The primary key of the observatory in the dr20_observatory table.

position_angle.name: position_angle
position_angle.description: The position angle of the field E of N in degrees.

slots_exposures.name: slots_exposures
slots_exposures.description: Exposures assigned to each LST and sky brightness slot

field_id.name: field_id
field_id.description: The idenifier of a field within a version of the survey plan.
